title: Dev Properties & Construction marketing website (Lucknow)

requirements.text: Create a responsive, modern, professional marketing website for “Dev Properties & Construction” with a trustworthy, premium, simple look using a clean blue/white theme, modern typography, and real-estate/construction visuals (homes, apartments, construction).

quotes: Create a modern, professional real estate + construction website for a company named “Dev Properties & Construction”... The website should feel trustworthy, premium, and simple. Use a clean blue/white theme, modern fonts, and real estate visuals (homes, apartments, construction).

acceptanceCriteria: Site uses a consistent blue/white palette and modern font styling across all sections
All pages/sections are mobile-first and scale cleanly to desktop
Visuals used throughout the site clearly relate to real estate and construction

requirements.text: Implement site navigation that provides access to these sections/pages: Home, About Us, Services, Properties (Buy/Sell/Rent), Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, Contact Us.

quotes: Include sections: Home, About Us, Services, Properties (Buy/Sell/Rent), Construction, Why Choose Us, Testimonials, Contact Us.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes links for all requested sections
Clicking a navigation item takes the user to the corresponding section (via dedicated routes or in-page anchors)
Navigation works on mobile (e.g., collapsible menu) and desktop

requirements.text: Add clear, prominent CTAs throughout the site, including buttons labeled exactly: “Get Free Consultation”, “List Your Property”, and “Book Site Visit”.

quotes: Add strong CTAs like “Get Free Consultation”, “List Your Property”, and “Book Site Visit”.

acceptanceCriteria: All three CTA labels appear on the site as clickable buttons/links
At least one CTA is visible above the fold on the Home section
CTAs are visually emphasized (primary/secondary button styling consistent with the theme)

requirements.text: Create the Home section with a hero area that introduces the company (Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India; 15 years experience; services summary) and includes at least one primary CTA.

quotes: The business has 15 years of experience and specializes in buying, selling, reselling properties, property management, and construction services.

acceptanceCriteria: Home hero clearly states company name and location (Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India)
Home includes a visible mention of “15 years of experience”
Home includes a brief list/summary of core offerings (buy/sell/resell, property management, construction)

requirements.text: Create the About Us section describing Dev Properties & Construction, emphasizing 15 years of experience, trust, and local expertise in Lucknow.

quotes: The business has 15 years of experience... The website should feel trustworthy, premium, and simple.

acceptanceCriteria: About Us content is written in English and references 15 years of experience
Tone is professional and trust-building (no placeholder lorem ipsum)

requirements.text: Create the Services section that clearly lists and describes: buying properties, selling properties, reselling properties, property management, and construction services.

quotes: specializes in buying, selling, reselling properties, property management, and construction services

acceptanceCriteria: All five services are explicitly listed
Each service has a short English description that is not placeholder text
Services layout is responsive and visually consistent (cards or similar)

requirements.text: Create the Properties section with distinct options for Buy, Sell, and Rent; include a clean UI to switch between these categories (tabs/segmented control) and show representative property cards/content for each category (static content is acceptable).

quotes: Properties (Buy/Sell/Rent)

acceptanceCriteria: Properties section has clear Buy/Sell/Rent category switching
Each category shows at least 3 representative cards/items
Property cards have consistent structure (e.g., title, location, price label, quick CTA)

requirements.text: Create the Construction section describing construction offerings and process (e.g., planning, design, execution, quality, timelines), aligned to a premium, trustworthy tone.

quotes: Include sections: ... Construction ...
real estate + construction website

acceptanceCriteria: Construction section includes a clear summary of construction services
Construction section includes at least 3 process/highlight points (e.g., quality, timeline, transparency)

requirements.text: Create the Why Choose Us section with clear value propositions relevant to the business (e.g., 15 years experience, local market expertise, transparent dealing, end-to-end support, quality construction).

quotes: Include sections: ... Why Choose Us ...
The business has 15 years of experience

acceptanceCriteria: Why Choose Us section contains at least 5 distinct bullet/value items
At least one item references 15 years of experience

requirements.text: Create the Testimonials section with a premium layout and at least 3 testimonials (English) presented as example client feedback (clearly not attributed to real individuals unless generic names are used).

quotes: Include sections: ... Testimonials ...

acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 testimonial cards are shown
Testimonials are readable, professional, and consistent with a premium theme

requirements.text: Create the Contact Us section that displays the phone number, email, and physical address exactly as provided, and includes a contact form for inquiries (name, phone, email, message).

quotes: Add ... phone number +91 85659 64384, email devproperties44@gmail.com, and address A 158 near Kalandi Park, Sector 16, Vrindavan Colony, Lucknow 226029.

acceptanceCriteria: Contact section displays phone: +91 85659 64384
Contact section displays email: devproperties44@gmail.com
Contact section displays address: A 158 near Kalandi Park, Sector 16, Vrindavan Colony, Lucknow 226029
Contact form validates required fields and shows a success state on submit

requirements.text: Add a floating WhatsApp button that opens a WhatsApp chat to the provided phone number, and ensure the phone number and email are clickable (tel: and mailto: links).

quotes: Add a WhatsApp button, phone number +91 85659 64384, email devproperties44@gmail.com

acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp floating button is visible on all pages/sections and opens WhatsApp chat for +91 85659 64384
Phone number link uses tel: and works on mobile
Email link uses mailto: and opens the user’s email client

requirements.text: Backend: implement minimal persistence for contact form submissions in the single Motoko actor (store timestamped inquiries) and expose methods to create an inquiry and list inquiries (for future admin use).

quotes: Contact Us... Add ... email ... phone ...
Add strong CTAs ... Get Free Consultation ...

acceptanceCriteria: A backend method exists to submit an inquiry with name/phone/email/message and timestamp
A backend method exists to list inquiries (most recent first or with a clear order)
Frontend contact form submission calls the backend and displays success/error feedback without page reload

requirements.text: Add a consistent site footer containing company name, quick links to the main sections, and the provided contact details (phone/email/address).

quotes: Include sections... Contact Us. Add ... phone ... email ... address ...

acceptanceCriteria: Footer appears on all pages/sections
Footer includes phone, email, and address exactly as provided
Footer includes navigation links to main sections

requirements.text: Ensure all user-facing copy is in English and avoids placeholder text; include the company name “Dev Properties & Construction” prominently in the header/branding.

quotes: Create ... website for a company named “Dev Properties & Construction”
Use English for any user-facing text in the build request.

acceptanceCriteria: No lorem ipsum/placeholder content is visible
Company name appears in header/branding area on the site

requirements.text: Add and render generated static visual assets (from frontend/public/assets/generated) that match the real estate + construction theme (hero/banner and a small set of section visuals/icons).

quotes: Use ... real estate visuals (homes, apartments, construction).

acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are used in the UI (e.g., hero, section imagery, or icons)
Images load correctly in production build without being served from the backend

constraints: Use the pre-injected React + TypeScript + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + React Query template.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose them instead).
Do not edit immutable hook/entry files: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx.
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor with all logic in backend/main.mo; only add backend/migration.mo if an upgrade-safe state migration is required.
No third-party auth providers; only Internet Identity is supported (not required for this marketing site).
nonGoals: User authentication/admin dashboard for managing properties
A full CMS for adding/editing property listings
Payments, booking/payment processing, or third-party CRM/email integrations

required: Premium real estate hero banner with modern homes/apartments and subtle construction elements, blue/white palette (hero-real-estate-construction.dim_1600x800.png)
Minimal set of 5 monochrome line icons in a consistent style for: buy, sell, rent, property management, construction (services-icons-sprite.dim_800x200.png)
Clean abstract city/skyline or architectural pattern background, very subtle, blue/white (section-bg-architecture.dim_1600x900.png)
Professional testimonial section background texture/pattern, subtle, blue/white (testimonials-bg.dim_1600x600.png)
